page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.medium is an entry-level virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 2 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is configured with 2 physical cores, 1 thread per core, and 4.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results indicate limited performance capabilities. The instance scored 1108.59 on stress-ng single-core CPU testing and 2194.17 on multi-core testing. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with read-only large block speeds at 16.3 GB/sec and write large block speeds at 14.46 GB/sec. Database operations and static web serving throughput are low, measuring 570.41 on PassMark database tests and 1.9 GB/sec for web serving.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but lower-tier performance metrics, this instance represents a low-cost option for workloads that require dedicated resources without high compute demands. It is best suited for lightweight applications, basic web serving, development and testing environments, or simple Redis caching tasks where high memory or storage throughput is not critical.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.medium is an entry-level, KVM-based virtual server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 4.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and contains no local storage or GPU hardware. Benchmark data shows modest performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 2194.17 and a PassMark database operations score of 570.41, placing it in the lower performance tiers. This instance is qualitatively cost-effective for low-demand, dedicated resource environments. It is best suited for light general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, development testing, and small-scale caching.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.medium is a KVM-based server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and no local storage, offering entry-level performance for basic web serving and development.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.medium is an entry-level server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and no local storage, built for light workloads.
tagline: A dedicated, entry-level virtual server configured with dual Intel Xeon cores and balanced memory for lightweight, budget-conscious workloads.
bullet_points: Features 2 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz.
Equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory and no local storage.
Delivers 1.9 GB/sec static web serving throughput and 2.87 million Redis SET operations/sec.
Utilizes KVM virtualization on x86_64 architecture.
Best suited for basic web serving, development environments, and light background tasks.
